scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: हम सबने school में grammar तो पढ़ी है, right? [We all studied grammar in school, right?]
Character A says: लेकिन जब actual में English बोलने की बारी आती है, तो हम अटक जाते हैं। [But when it actually comes to speaking English, we get stuck.]
Character A says: क्यूंकि हमारे आस-पास English बोलने वाला माहौल ही नहीं है, तो practice कैसे करें? [Because we don't have an English-speaking environment around us, so how do we practice?]
Character A says: It's like, how do I do that? [It's like, how do I do that?]
Character A says: So that's why I want to recommend Supernova to you guys. [So that's why I want to recommend Supernova to you guys.]
Character A says: So me and my AI teacher, [So me and my AI teacher,]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable Indian context: knowing grammar but struggling to speak.
- Validates the user's struggle by pointing out the lack of an English-speaking environment.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to this specific problem.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
हम सबने school में grammar तो पढ़ी है We all studied grammar in school
लेकिन जब बोलने की बारी आती है But when it comes to speaking
तो हम अटक जाते हैं we get stuck

practice कैसे करें? How do we practice?

Supernova try करो Try Supernova
me and my AI teacher, मैं और मेरी AI teacher

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: We've been practicing for a job interview, right? [We've been practicing for a job interview, right?]
Character A says: So one of the questions I can choose is like, 'Tell me about yourself?' [So one of the questions I can choose is like, 'Tell me about yourself?']
Character B says: Hi there! Let's practice your interview. So, tell me about yourself? [Hi there! Let's practice your interview. So, tell me about yourself?]
Character A says: Okay, imagine you're in a real interview setting. [Okay, imagine you're in a real interview setting.]
Character B says: What's the first thing you'd say? [What's the first thing you'd say?]
Character A says: I am working in sales for three years and I likes to talk to customers. [I am working in sales for three years and I likes to talk to customers.]
Character B says: Great start! Just a quick tip: say 'I have been working' and 'I like to talk'. What do you enjoy most about it? [Great start! Just a quick tip: say 'I have been working' and 'I like to talk'. What do you enjoy most about it?]
Character A says: Well, I love solving their problems, but sometimes it's challenging. [Well, I love solving their problems, but sometimes it's challenging.]
Character B says: That makes total sense! Problem-solving is a valuable skill. [That makes total sense! Problem-solving is a valuable skill.]
Character A says: It evaluates the score right after. [It evaluates the score right after.]
Character A says: और सबसे अच्छी बात? कोई जज नहीं करेगा, because it's AI. [And the best part? No one will judge you, because it's AI.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts the demo to a job interview scenario, which is highly relevant to Supernova's career-focused demographic.
- Demonstrates the AI's ability to provide gentle, real-time grammar corrections without breaking the conversational flow.
- Highlights the psychological safety of the app: practicing with AI means zero judgment or embarrassment.

Hi there! Let's practice your interview. So, tell me about yourself?
It's like you're talking to a real person एकदम असली इंसान से बात करने जैसा

What's the first thing you'd say?
They pinpoint your mistake right on the spot आपकी गलती तुरंत सुधारते हैं!
I am working -> I have been working
I likes -> I like
Great start! Just a quick tip: say 'I have been working' and 'I like to talk'. What do you enjoy most about it?

Your English Level Advanced C1 74 out of 100

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: I always say, English बोलना सीखने का best तरीका है, real-life situations में रोज़ practice करना। Number one. [I always say, the best way to learn to speak English is to practice daily in real-life situations. Number one.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a final, encouraging piece of advice that aligns perfectly with Supernova's core methodology.
- Reinforces the importance of daily practice in real-world contexts.
- Ends the ad on a confident, authoritative, yet warm note.
